description: Maps a Wave fee type (SHIPPING_COST, PLASTIC_BAGS, ...) to an ERP Item used as a Sales Order line.

fields.description: Wave fee type as emitted in order payloads.
fields.label: Wave Fee Type

fields.description: ERP Item code to append as a Sales Order line when this fee appears.
fields.label: ERP Item

fields.description: Optional human-readable note, shown in the mapping grid.
fields.label: Description

name: Wave Fee Mapping
